title: penstemon guadalupensis var. ernestii
intro: Penstemon guadalupensis var. ernestii, also known as the Guadalupe beardtongue, is a perennial plant species belonging to the penstemon family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Penstemon guadalupensis var. ernestii include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions, which can be used to make teas or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
